name: Golf Performance Group
about: Golf Performance Group (GPG) is an indoor/outdoor golf academy and simulator facility located at Timber Creek Golf Club in Friendswood, Texas. They offer data-driven player development programs using premium technology like Trackman and Uneekor, with a focus on structured practice over traditional range time. GPG provides memberships, private lessons, club fittings, and simulator access for golfers of all ages and abilities, emphasizing a fun, collaborative environment that complements technical coaching with sport psychology principles.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to PGA Tour-level technology like Trackman 4 and Uneekor
Structured player development programs with certified coaching
Indoor/outdoor bay flexibility with 4 golf simulators
Family-friendly environment with junior academy programs
Comprehensive club fitting services with premium brands

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar system trusted by PGA Tour for precise ball flight and club data
High-speed camera technology with AI for swing analysis and virtual golf
Tiger Woods' launch monitor for accurate ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons, practice, and simulator play. Club rentals are not mentioned as an option.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, GPG does not mention food or drink service, and there is no indication of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Time is not specified in the content. Typical simulator play can range from 2-4 hours depending on course and pace.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GPG has a junior golf academy for children starting at age 5, with programs tailored to different age and ability levels.
